message:
Update beads with comprehensive unit tests and E2E test specifications

Enhanced 8 beads with detailed testing requirements:
- asupersync-r23: Entropy isolation with determinism verification
- asupersync-07w: Meta-testing framework with mutation coverage
- asupersync-uyw: Network simulation with fault injection tests
- asupersync-ucb: Circuit breaker with state machine tests
- asupersync-616: Bulkhead with FIFO ordering tests
- asupersync-ij4: Rate limiter with token bucket tests
- asupersync-gy8: CLI guidelines with output format tests
- asupersync-lwz: Profiling with regression detection tests

Each bead now includes:
- Comprehensive unit tests with expected outcomes
- E2E test scripts with detailed logging
- Tracing strategy for observability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
